items.title: Charge anywhere with Schumacher’s level 1 + 2 NACS to J1772 EV adapter at a new $47.50 low
items.summary: Amazon is offering EV drivers the Schumacher Level 1 + 2 NACS to J1772 EV Charging Adapter down at $47.50 shipped right now. Down from an $80 full price, discounts before today have been slowly cascading the price lower and lower across 2026, with it having gone as low as $48 previously. Now, you can score it for your J1772-compatible EV with a 41% markdown that cuts $32.50 off the tag for the best new low price we have tracked.

This is regularly a $500 unit, which has been sitting at the $390 mark for Prime members over the last couple of months. It dropped to $350 for the first time during the recent Prime Day sale, and today’s deal lands it back to that price with a $150 discount on its listed price. It’s one of the most feature-packed TB5 docks you can get to upgrade your workstation, and you can learn more about its features below.

items.title: Get 2x batteries with Worx’s 40V 17-inch self-adapting cordless electric Intellicut mower down at second-lowest $230 price
items.summary: Over at Amazon you can currently find the budget-friendly Worx 40V 17-inch 2-in-1 Cordless Electric Intellicut Lawn Mower with 2x 4.0Ah batteries down at $229.99 shipped. While this model has been seen climbing as high as $380 earlier in the year, it more regularly carries a $300 full price tag, with discounts dropping things between $280 and $250 during most of 2026, until last month’s Prime Day event took it lower to $219. If you missed out on that all-time low, you’re getting the next-best price to date here as $70 is slashed off the going rate (and $150 off the hiked pricing). You can also find a few additional tool deals in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: B&H has one of the best SSD deals right now with this SanDisk 4TB Extreme portable drive at a massive 53% off
items.summary: Today only, as part of its daily deals, B&H is offering SanDisk’s 4TB Extreme Portable SSD in the Monterey finish for $419.99 shipped. The drive is listed at $900, but you save a whopping $480 with a coupon that automatically applies during checkout. That works out to a 53% discount from B&H’s listed price and marks the lowest price we have tracked for this model since the recent storage price hike. For context, this 4TB drive used to sell closer to the $300 mark before memory prices started climbing, but it has since jumped sharply to fetch as much as $800 in recent months at Amazon. SanDisk currently lists this same variant for $900, so while today’s deal is still not as low as the old pricing, it is a solid offer in the current market, especially with similar 4TB portable SSDs now sitting much closer to $800.

items.title: This tiny pocket-sized 45W power bank with built-in USB-C cable is only $25 today
items.summary:
Baseus PicoGo AC22 Mini 10K power bank with built-in USB-C cable

Buy for $25 (Reg. $40)

Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

This compact Baseus power bank carries a 10,000mAh battery, giving you enough backup power to top up your phone when you’re away from an outlet. It has a small, travel-friendly design that’s easy to slip into a bag or pocket, along with a built-in USB-C cable that doubles as a handy carry loop. The integrated cable supports up to 45W output, and you also get an extra USB-C port for charging another device, plus a display that shows the remaining battery level at a glance.

items.title: Why this CEO thinks video games make better training data than the internet

That gap, it turns out, might be filled by gaming data. That’s the bet behind General Intuition, a […]
